objective: Implement an internal PubMed preview layer for product pages using PubMed API, with optional Firebase caching.

new_collections.name: pubmed_cache
new_collections.purpose: Cache PubMed preview results per product to reduce repeated API calls and keep users inside the application.

ui_behavior.entry_point: Browse PubMed button inside Scientific Resources accordion
ui_behavior.interaction: Open internal literature preview panel instead of external redirect

cache_rules.fallback_if_api_fails: show stale cached results if available

visibility_rules.public_users: may see literature preview on public products
visibility_rules.professional_users: same behavior unless deeper scientific blocks are added later

compatibility_rules: Do not break current product page routes
Do not remove existing accordion structure
Do not remove semantic search logic
Do not rename existing Firebase fields such as slug, tags, semanticKeywords
